name: Anz Group Holdings Limited
analysis: ANZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$35.2000, stop A$33.4917, target A$39.3615 (2.44:1) — then trail it.
